title: Step S-SWQT-0015: Catalog 导出门禁与 Playwright 走读

items.statement: 建立 catalog-export CI 检查、扩展 Playwright /components 走读，并更新 experience 文档关闭 Phase 2。

inScope: scripts/check-catalog-export.mjs（或扩展现有 check）对齐 catalog 与 exports。
browser.spec.mjs 增加 /components 索引与代表性 demo 用例。
quality.yml 集成新检查；mcp-smoke 覆盖新 tools。
docs/experience/portal-and-mcp.md Phase 2 节；R-SWUI-002 状态更新。

items.problemDefinition: catalog demo 与 exports 可能漂移且无回归。
items.requirementsDefinition: CI fail on drift；Playwright 覆盖主路径。

items.summary: Added check:catalog-export CI gate, Playwright /components walkthrough, and Phase 2 experience docs.
items.result: Phase 2 acceptance is repeatable in CI and local gates.

cases.name: Catalog drift fails CI
cases.evidence: check:catalog-export validates catalog exports against package and demo registry.

gateOutcomes.evidence: 26 Playwright cases include /components index and representative demos.

items.rootMount: Yes - layout v3 stable Step path; no physical archive move.
items.hardPromotionGateSummary: minimum auto-filled by workflow promote; validationSummary provided.

items.minimumSetSatisfied: Yes - workflow promote populated minimum registry/audit records before setting status=delivered.

requirementAudit.requirement: reviewed Step can be delivered only with closure records.
requirementAudit.evidence: workflow promote populated delivered-registry-entry and completion-audit before status=delivered.
requirementAudit.risk: Minimum auto-fill is less descriptive than a hand-authored Completion Audit.
requirementAudit.followUp: Review owner may enrich the audit before delivery when richer evidence is required.

items.intermediateDocumentStateAudit: delivered-registry-entry and completion-audit populated before final status=delivered.

closingSelfAudit.closingSelfAuditEvidence: Closing triad minimum: reviewed precondition satisfied; validationSummary present; registry/audit records populated before status=delivered.
